diagrams.title: Static vs Instance Members Memory Layout
diagrams.description: Shows how static members are stored in global data segment while instance members are stored separately in each object
elements: Arrow showing both objects point to same static member
diagrams.purpose: Understand memory allocation difference between static and instance members

diagrams.title: Access Methods for Static Members
diagrams.description: Shows two ways to access static members: via class name and via object name
elements: Both point to same memory location
Note: both access same single copy
diagrams.purpose: Learn correct syntax for accessing static members

diagrams.title: Object Counter using Static
diagrams.description: Demonstrates object creation/destruction tracking using static member
elements: Class Box with static int count
diagrams.purpose: Understand practical use of static members for tracking
